description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a gently reclined seat and backrest upholstered in a light beige material. The seat and backrest are contoured with subtle, segmented padding that provides ergonomic support and visual interest. The frame is constructed from a striking blue metal, forming an angular, X-shaped base that gives the piece a contemporary and sturdy appearance. The legs are wide-set and splayed, enhancing stability and adding to the modern aesthetic. There are no visible armrests, emphasizing the open, lounge-friendly design. The overall look is sleek and inviting, suitable for urban parks, plazas, or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A modern beige-upholstered chaise with a contoured seat and backrest, supported by a bold blue metal X-frame base. The design is sleek, armless, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the chaise, highlighting the contoured seat and backrest with the blue X-shaped metal frame.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wide, flat seat and the absence of armrests, with the blue frame visible beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again emphasizing the chaise's ergonomic contour and blue metal support.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid blue back panel and the splayed legs, with the beige upholstery just visible at the top.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is moderately high, gently reclined, and features a segmented, contoured design for ergonomic support. It is upholstered in beige fabric with subtle horizontal divisions, giving it a modern and comfortable appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the chaise has an open, armless design.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are constructed from blue metal and form an angular, X-shaped base that is both wide-set and splayed, providing stability and a contemporary look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid beige with a smooth, slightly padded texture and visible horizontal segmentation, but no decorative patterns or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: The chaise features a single, integrated cushion that extends seamlessly from the seat to the backrest, with no separate or loose cushions visible.
